content:
"""CLI entry point for nc_chipgen.

Usage::

    python -m nc_chipgen --soc-config examples/medium.yaml --out build/
    python -m nc_chipgen --soc-config soc.yaml --out build/ --skip-synth
    python -m nc_chipgen --soc-config soc.yaml --out build/ --full-synth
    python -m nc_chipgen --soc-config soc.yaml --out build/ --core-width 1200 --core-height 900
"""

from __future__ import annotations

import argparse
import sys
from pathlib import Path

from .defaults import DEFAULT_TARGET_UTIL, DEFAULT_ASPECT_RATIO


def main(argv: list[str] | None = None) -> None:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
        prog="nc_chipgen",
        description="Unified SoC + Padframe chip generator. "
        "Takes an NC_SOCGEN config and produces chip-level RTL "
        "(compute_ss + padframe + wrapper + top).",
    )

    parser.add_argument(
        "--soc-config", required=True, type=Path,
        help="Path to the NC_SOCGEN SoC YAML configuration file.",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--out", "-o", required=True, type=Path,
        help="Output directory for all generated artifacts.",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--pdk-root", type=Path, required=True,
        help="PDK root directory (required).",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--nc-lib-root", type=Path, default=None,
        help="Directory containing the peripheral IP cores (NC_UART, NC_GPIO, etc.). "
             "Defaults to NC_LIB_ROOT env var.",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--socgen-root", type=Path, default=None,
        help="Path to the NC_SOCGEN source directory. Only needed when nc_socgen "
             "is not installed as a pip package. Defaults to NC_SOCGEN_ROOT env var.",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--padframe-gen-root", type=Path, default=None,
        help="Path to the padframe-gen directory. Defaults to PADFRAME_GEN_ROOT env var.",
    )

    synth_group = parser.add_mutually_exclusive_group()
    synth_group.add_argument(
        "--skip-synth", action="store_true",
        help="Skip synthesis entirely. Padframe uses I/O-limited sizing.",
    )
    synth_group.add_argument(
        "--full-synth", action="store_true",
        help="Run full LibreLane synthesis (accurate, slow). "
        "Default is quick Yosys estimate.",
    )

    parser.add_argument(
        "--core-width", type=float, default=None,
        help="Manual core width override in µm (skips synthesis).",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--core-height", type=float, default=None,
        help="Manual core height override in µm (skips synthesis).",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--aspect-ratio", type=float, default=DEFAULT_ASPECT_RATIO,
        help=f"Core aspect ratio (width/height, default {DEFAULT_ASPECT_RATIO}).",
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "--target-util", type=float, default=DEFAULT_TARGET_UTIL,
        help=f"Target utilization for area calculation (default {DEFAULT_TARGET_UTIL}).",
    )

    args = parser.parse_args(argv)

    if not args.soc_config.exists():
        parser.error(f"SoC config not found: {args.soc_config}")
    if not args.pdk_root.exists():
        parser.error(f"PDK root not found: {args.pdk_root}")
    if args.nc_lib_root is not None and not args.nc_lib_root.exists():
        parser.error(f"nc-lib-root not found: {args.nc_lib_root}")
    if args.socgen_root is not None and not args.socgen_root.exists():
        parser.error(f"socgen-root not found: {args.socgen_root}")
    if args.padframe_gen_root is not None and not args.padframe_gen_root.exists():
        parser.error(f"padframe-gen-root not found: {args.padframe_gen_root}")

    # If manual dimensions given, both must be specified
    if (args.core_width is None) != (args.core_height is None):
        parser.error("--core-width and --core-height must both be specified.")

    from .orchestrator import run_chipgen

    try:
        summary = run_chipgen(
            soc_config=args.soc_config,
            out=args.out,
            pdk_root=args.pdk_root,
            nc_lib_root=args.nc_lib_root,
            socgen_root=args.socgen_root,
            padframe_gen_root=args.padframe_gen_root,
            skip_synth=args.skip_synth,
            full_synth=args.full_synth,
            core_width=args.core_width,
            core_height=args.core_height,
            aspect_ratio=args.aspect_ratio,
            target_util=args.target_util,
        )
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error: {e}", file=sys.stderr)
        sys.exit(1)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

content:
Name: nc_chipgen
Version: 0.1.0
Summary: Unified SoC + Padframe chip generator for NativeChips
Home-page: 
Author: 
Author-email: 
License: 
Location: /home/user/.local/lib/python3.12/site-packages
Editable project location: /nc/apps/nc_chipgen
Requires: pyyaml
Required-by: 
Metadata-Version: 2.4
Installer: pip
Classifiers:
Entry-points:
  [console_scripts]
  nc_chipgen = nc_chipgen.cli:main
Project-URLs:
---
usage: nc_chipgen [-h] --soc-config SOC_CONFIG --out OUT --pdk-root PDK_ROOT
                  [--nc-lib-root NC_LIB_ROOT] [--socgen-root SOCGEN_ROOT]
                  [--padframe-gen-root PADFRAME_GEN_ROOT]
                  [--skip-synth | --full-synth] [--core-width CORE_WIDTH]
                  [--core-height CORE_HEIGHT] [--aspect-ratio ASPECT_RATIO]
                  [--target-util TARGET_UTIL]

Unified SoC + Padframe chip generator. Takes an NC_SOCGEN config and produces
chip-level RTL (compute_ss + padframe + wrapper + top).

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --soc-config SOC_CONFIG
                        Path to the NC_SOCGEN SoC YAML configuration file.
  --out OUT, -o OUT     Output directory for all generated artifacts.
  --pdk-root PDK_ROOT   PDK root directory (required).
  --nc-lib-root NC_LIB_ROOT
                        Directory containing the peripheral IP cores (NC_UART,
                        NC_GPIO, etc.). Defaults to NC_LIB_ROOT env var.
  --socgen-root SOCGEN_ROOT
                        Path to the NC_SOCGEN source directory. Only needed
                        when nc_socgen is not installed as a pip package.
                        Defaults to NC_SOCGEN_ROOT env var.
  --padframe-gen-root PADFRAME_GEN_ROOT
                        Path to the padframe-gen directory. Defaults to
                        PADFRAME_GEN_ROOT env var.
  --skip-synth          Skip synthesis entirely. Padframe uses I/O-limited
                        sizing.
  --full-synth          Run full LibreLane synthesis (accurate, slow). Default
                        is quick Yosys estimate.
---
nc_chipgen        0.1.0     /nc/apps/nc_chipgen
nc_socgen         0.1.0     /nc/apps/nc_socgen
padframe-gen      0.1.0     /nc/apps/padframe-gen

extras.command:
# Check if nc_chipgen has been extended or has verify subcommand
pip show nc-chipgen -v 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
python3 -m nc_chipgen --help 2>&1 | head -30
echo "---"
# Look at what's installed
pip list 2>/dev/null | grep -i "nc\|chip\|verify\|socgen"

content:
scenario_name: scenario_gpio_basic
description: >
  Verifies basic GPIO functionality across all three ports (GPIOA, GPIOB, GPIOC)
  of mspm33c321a_derivative. Covers output direction control and toggling on each
  of 48 pins, input read-back driven by an external gpio_stimulus model, and
  power-on reset default state (all pins Hi-Z input).
checklist_ids:
  - GPIO-01
  - GPIO-02
  - GPIO-03
  - GPIO-04
  - GPIO-05
  - GPIO-06
  - GPIO-07
test_names:
  - test_gpio_porta_output
  - test_gpio_porta_input
  - test_gpio_portb_output
  - test_gpio_portb_input
  - test_gpio_portc_output
  - test_gpio_portc_input
  - test_gpio_reset_state
priority: P0
dut:
  top_module: mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss
  filelist: rtl/compute_ss/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f

clock:
  name: clk
  period_ns: 12.5

reset:
  name: reset_n
  active_low: true
  assert_cycles: 20
  deassert_cycles: 5

external_devices:
  - name: jtag_probe_model
    type: gpio_stimulus
    connect:
      stimulus_out: gpioa_in[15:0]
    params:
      drive_pattern: WALKING_ONES
      hold_cycles: 4
  - name: jtag_probe_model_b
    type: gpio_stimulus
    connect:
      stimulus_out: gpiob_in[15:0]
    params:
      drive_pattern: WALKING_ONES
      hold_cycles: 4
  - name: jtag_probe_model_c
    type: gpio_stimulus
    connect:
      stimulus_out: gpioc_in[15:0]
    params:
      drive_pattern: WALKING_ONES
      hold_cycles: 4

stimulus:
  - step: 1
    action: check_reset_state
    description: Immediately after reset assert, sample OE registers for all three ports
    expected_oe: 0x0000   # all inputs (Hi-Z)
  - step: 2
    action: release_reset
    description: Release reset; GPIO ports remain in input mode
  - step: 3
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: GPIOA
    register: DIRCFG
    value: 0xFFFF
    description: Configure all GPIOA pins as output
  - step: 4
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: GPIOA
    register: DOUT
    value: 0xAAAA
    description: Write alternating pattern to GPIOA output register
  - step: 5
    action: sample_pad_output
    port: gpioa_out
    expected: 0xAAAA
    description: Observe GPIOA pad output signals match written pattern
  - step: 6
    action: drive_gpio_stimulus
    device: jtag_probe_model
    pattern: WALKING_ONES
    description: Drive GPIOA pads with walking-ones pattern via external model
  - step: 7
    action: apb_read_check
    peripheral: GPIOA
    register: DIN
    description: Read GPIOA input register; compare against driven pattern
  - step: 8
    action: repeat_steps
    steps: [3, 4, 5, 6, 7]
    ports: [GPIOB, GPIOC]
    devices: [jtag_probe_model_b, jtag_probe_model_c]
    description: Repeat output/input tests for GPIOB and GPIOC

checks:
  - id: CHK-GPIO-01
    checklist_id: GPIO-01
    description: GPIOA output pads reflect 0xAAAA written to DOUT
    expected: gpioa_out == 0xAAAA when DIRCFG=0xFFFF
  - id: CHK-GPIO-02
    checklist_id: GPIO-02
    description: GPIOA DIN reads back walking-ones pattern driven by stimulus model
    expected: DIN matches stimulus pattern on each cycle
  - id: CHK-GPIO-03
    checklist_id: GPIO-03
    description: GPIOB output pads reflect pattern written to DOUT
    expected: gpiob_out matches written value when all pins configured as output
  - id: CHK-GPIO-04
    checklist_id: GPIO-04
    description: GPIOB DIN reads back walking-ones pattern
    expected: DIN matches stimulus
  - id: CHK-GPIO-05
    checklist_id: GPIO-05
    description: GPIOC output pads reflect pattern written to DOUT
    expected: gpioc_out matches written value
  - id: CHK-GPIO-06
    checklist_id: GPIO-06
    description: GPIOC DIN reads back walking-ones pattern
    expected: DIN matches stimulus
  - id: CHK-GPIO-07
    checklist_id: GPIO-07
    description: All three port DIRCFG registers read 0x0000 immediately after reset
    expected: Default output-enable is 0 (input mode) for all 48 pins

pass_criteria:
  - All CHK-GPIO checks PASS
  - No X-states on output pads in output mode
  - No APB protocol errors during CSR access

---
"""Console-script entry point for gen_soc."""
from nc_socgen.gen_soc import main

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

extras.command:
# Check for a standalone verify tool / script
find /nc -name "verify*" -o -name "*verify*" 2>/dev/null | grep -v ipm | grep -v pycache | head -30
echo "---"
# Look at padframe-gen commands
ls /nc/apps/padframe-gen/padframe_gen/commands/
echo "---"
# Check nc_socgen _entry for subcommands
cat /nc/apps/nc_socgen/nc_socgen/_entry.py | head -80
